hero.title: Premium Escort Service
hero.subtitle: Roppongi & Akasaka
hero.description: Experience Tokyo's finest outcall escort service. Carefully selected beautiful companions delivered to your hotel or residence in the Roppongi & Akasaka area.

about.title: About Us
about.description: TOKYO ROZE is a licensed outcall escort (delivery health) service catering to international visitors and residents in Tokyo. We pride ourselves on providing the highest quality experience with carefully selected companions who are fluent in communication and dedicated to ensuring your complete satisfaction.

area.title: Service Areas
area.subtitle: We provide outcall service to the following areas in Tokyo
area.roppongiDesc: Tokyo's premier international entertainment district. Hotels, residences, and serviced apartments in the Roppongi Hills and Tokyo Midtown area.
area.akasakaDesc: Upscale district known for luxury hotels and corporate residences. Easy access from Roppongi.
area.coverageNote: Service available to all hotels and residences within the area. Contact us for locations outside listed areas.

recruit.title: Work With Us
recruit.heroSubtitle: Industry-leading compensation with complete freedom and flexibility
recruit.earningDesc: 70% free / 80% nominated — the industry's highest commission. Your effort is rewarded.
recruit.scheduleDesc: No office commute needed. Wait at home and take a taxi when a booking comes in.
recruit.transportDesc: Round-trip taxi fare to every client is 100% company-paid. Zero out-of-pocket.
recruit.paymentDesc: Earnings transferred to your bank the next business day. No waiting.
recruit.step1Desc: Set your own hours freely. Just log in to the app when you want to work. No fixed shifts.
recruit.step2Desc: We'll notify you via SNS with the client's location, course, and time.
recruit.step3Desc: Take a taxi to the guest's hotel. All transport costs are covered by the company.
recruit.step4Desc: After your appointment, earnings are transferred to your account the next business day.
recruit.benefit5: Fully remote — work from home, no commute
recruit.benefit6: Flexible hours — set your own schedule
recruit.benefit8: Easy communication via LINE, WhatsApp, Telegram
recruit.faq1q: Do I really not need to commute?
recruit.faq1a: Correct! You wait at home and only travel by taxi (fully covered) when you have a booking.
recruit.faq2a: The next business day via bank transfer. It's essentially daily pay.
recruit.faq3a: Mostly international business travelers staying at hotels. Well-mannered and respectful.
recruit.faq4q: Can I work another job too?
recruit.faq4a: Absolutely. Fully flexible schedule means you can balance other work easily.
recruit.applyDesc: Contact us on your preferred platform
recruit.confidential: All inquiries are strictly confidential. Feel free to reach out.

footer.legal: This service operates under a valid license as per Japan's Entertainment Business Control Act (風営法届出済).
footer.disclaimer: All companions are 18 years of age or older. Valid ID verification is required.

entrance.title: Age Verification
entrance.subtitle: This website is for adults aged 18 and over only.
entrance.warning: Access by minors under 18 is prohibited by law.
